assertions.title: Feature listing stays mission-scoped and filterable

steps.expected: Command should fail with missing required flag
steps.observed: Exit code 1, error: required option '--mission <id>' not specified

steps.expected: List all 5 features for the mission
steps.observed: Listed 5 features with stable ordering (total: 5, filtered: 5)

steps.expected: Filter to milestone-1 features only (3 features)
Filter to milestone-2 features only (2 features)

steps.observed: Listed pending features with correct filtering (total: 5, filtered: 4)
Listed 3 pending features from milestone-1 (combined filter works)

assertions.title: Feature updates persist status and worker reports safely

steps.expected: Status transition from pending to in_progress succeeds
steps.observed: Feature updated successfully, status: in_progress, exit code 0

steps.action: Verify status persisted via list --status in_progress

steps.expected: Inline report persisted and stored in workers/feat-002/report.json
steps.observed: Feature updated, report persisted to workers/feat-002/report.json

steps.action: Create report file and update feat-003 --report @file.json
steps.expected: File report read and persisted to workers/feat-003/report.json
steps.observed: File report successfully parsed and persisted

steps.action: Update feat-002 to completed with report, then transition back to pending
steps.expected: Retry transition preserves last stored report
steps.observed: Feature updated to pending, original report preserved in feature data

summary: All assertions passed. VAL-FEATURE-001: Feature listing is correctly mission-scoped and supports milestone and status filters with stable ordering. VAL-FEATURE-002: Feature updates properly persist status transitions, worker reports (inline and file-based) are stored at workers/{featureId}/report.json, and retry transitions preserve the last stored report.
